testcase.name: shouldDenyCreateForNonAdmin

--- [trymily-api] [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists appointments cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists services cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists tenants cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists users cascade Hibernate: create table appointments ( created_at timestamp(6) with time zone, end_time timestamp(6) with time zone not null, start_time timestamp(6) with time zone not null, updated_at timestamp(6) with time zone, id uuid not null, tenant_id uuid not null, customer_name varchar(255) not null, status varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table services ( duration_minutes integer not null, price numeric(12,2) not null, version integer, created_at timestamp(6) with time zone, updated_at timestamp(6) with time zone, id uuid not null, tenant_id uuid not null, created_by varchar(255), description varchar(255), last_modified_by varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null, status varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table tenants ( created_at timestamp(6) with time zone, updated_at timestamp(6) with time zone, id uuid not null, phone varchar(20), address text, logo_url text, name varchar(255) not null, status varchar(255) not null, settings jsonb, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table users ( created_at timestamp(6) with time zone, updated_at timestamp(6) with time zone, id uuid not null, tenant_id uuid, email varchar(255) not null unique, full_name varchar(255), password varchar(255), picture_url varchar(255), provider varchar(255) not null, provider_id varchar(255) unique, role varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: alter table if exists appointments add constraint FKrx65i1v7m43ynclnw2sqn1sj foreign key (tenant_id) references tenants Hibernate: alter table if exists users add constraint FK21hn1a5ja1tve7ae02fnn4cld foreign key (tenant_id) references tenants 2026-02-25T20:55:08.144-03:00 INFO 8033 --- [trymily-api] [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit
